description: User dwells on the Explore page, observing the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel as it cycles through different offers including various surveys and an AI Interview.
frame_description: The Explore page displays a horizontal carousel of tasks at the top and a vertical list of sessions below.

description: The 'Sessions to schedule' list updates, and a new 'Diary Study' task for $40 becomes visible at the bottom of the screen.
